categories.label: Sheep
categories.description: 1 point per sheep. Lose 3 points if you have 3 or fewer. Bonus: +1 per sheep beyond 13.

categories.label: Pigs
categories.description: 1 point per pig. Lose 3 points if you have 3 or fewer. Bonus: +1 per pig beyond 11.

categories.label: Cows
categories.description: 1 point per cow. Lose 3 points if you have 3 or fewer. Bonus: +1 per cow beyond 10.

categories.label: Horses
categories.description: 1 point per horse. Lose 3 points if you have 3 or fewer. Bonus: +1 per horse beyond 9.

categories.label: Animal Bonus/Penalty
categories.description: Sum of all bonus points (+1 per extra animal past threshold) and penalties (-3 per type with 3 or fewer)

categories.label: Building Points
categories.description: Points from buildings: Half-Timbered House (5), Open Stables (2), Storage Building (variable), Shelter (0)

categories.label: Farm Expansions
categories.description: 4 points per fully used farm expansion (all 3 spaces must have a building, feeding trough, or be part of a fully enclosed pasture)
